case_title: CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC. VS. CYBER ARK LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION PURSUANT TO CCP 585 (TRANSACTION ID # 100211869) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS ADJUSTMENT BUREAU, INC.
